text: The world here feels meticulously constructed, each pane of glass and wall of color arranged with purpose. Yet, the silence and emptiness are almost oppressive, heightening my own sense of separation from this carefully curated environment. As I observe the exhibit about research and development, I am struck by how much of human progress is a negotiation with uncertainty. I am simultaneously fascinated and anxious, aware of the effort to organize knowledge—and the underlying chaos it both masks and reveals.
